name: Oracle IDCS Duplicate Membership Assignments
description: Detects duplicate Oracle IDCS group membership rows for the same member and group.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id AS member_key, COUNT(*) AS membership_count FROM oracle_idcs_group_memberships m WHERE m.group_id IS NOT NULL AND m.user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.group_id, m.user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Deduplicate repeated membership rows and validate provisioning idempotency in sync pipelines.
